subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory, sanctified beyond all utterance and understanding, befit and beseem the Lord of all worlds, Who hath illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنای مقدس از بیان و عرفان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که عالم را از
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
